subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! Thy lamentations were heard, and thy distress in separation from the Luminary of the horizons was witnessed. By My life, mention hath preceded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه نالت اصغا شد و اضطرابت در فراق نیر آفاق مشاهده گشت لعمری ذکری سبق
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
